general_info:
Parking and Load In:
Load In Team: WHEN YOU ARRIVE ONSITE!Each team lead will be required to check-in with the Sequoia Productions Loading Dock Manager and will then be provided with a packet containing wristband credentials. These credentials need to be distributed to each member of your team each day they are scheduled to be on-site. Please note that check-in on Event Days (Sept, 6, 7, 14) will be located in West Hall B


Musicians: Please Read Attached Parking Document + A parking placard or voucher must be visible on your vehicle dashboard in order to gain entry to
Lot C! (attached as well)

Please park in Lot C at 1151 L.A. Live Way, Los Angeles, CA 90015. On Creative Arts Show Days,
Parking Lot C may be accessed by heading north on L.A. Live Way from the Pico Blvd & L.A. Live Way
intersection. Alternatively, you may head south on L.A. Live Way from the 11 Street & L.A. Live Way
intersection.

general_info:
Parking and Load In:
Can drive up close to the ceremony, cocktail hour/dinner sites to load. Reception/dancing load-in is directly from parking lot.

You may drive along the main road to the parking area closer to the ceremony site (near where "15" is on the map) to unload for the ceremony, and next to the patios to unload to cocktail hour. Load-in to Vintner's Barn is from Parking ("M"). Please move car(s) away from the barn side of the parking lot after unloading to allow for other event pros to unload/load. Please re-park in the parking lot further up Mountain Home Ranch Road behind the New Victorian (marked "18, 19, 20, 21" on map).


• Loading:
    ◦ Vintner's Barn (A), pull up in parking lot right next to the barn
    ◦ Lower Patio (C): drive down road to park and load right next to space
    ◦ Walnut Tree (F): drive down main road, park in parking spots next to main road and walk in through small pathway

• Parking: everyone should repark in the parking lot behind the Victorians (18, 19, 20, 21) in order to leave room in the parking lot next to Vintner's Barn for loading

Dress Code:
Gentleman - black suit, white shirt, black bow tie, black dress shoes
Ladies - black formal dress, black dress shoes

Green Room:
Barolo Room

Reception: Reception Sound + Band + Horns 6pm-10pm (4hrs)

Ceremony Outdoor
